title: Achievements+
description: A datapack that adds custom achievements for killing mobs (in work)
body:
# Achievements+ 2 is here!
### What exactly does this mean? 
- It means that I changed the pages, still in work to look even better, with collections and having only two pages for mobs helps organizing things better!
- We also have a day counter, to keep track of your days
- Also made a rarity system for the mobs (only theoretical now, which is going to reflect the last achievement for each mob)
 
###### The datapack works for 1.21-1.21.5 too, only that the achievements tab background does not appear.

Thank you for trying this datapack, let me know if you have any titles ideas and any other feedback you might have!
(Currently on CurseForge under the same name, I'll make a discord later on)

Future ideas:
- Rewards given after certain scores are met
- Side stories/quests

_Achievements+ is the continuation of my "Monster Slayer" idea from Recipes+
It's purpose is to develop the idea even further, creating custom titles for all mobs._
